_note: Popular classical themes (main themes from symphonies/sonatas/operas) queued for follow-up authoring. Works are PD; we engrave our own. Author as recognizable monophonic principal theme, melody-only.
_au_rule: AU PD = composer died <=1955. Flagged composers (Stravinsky, Sibelius, Khachaturian) are NOT yet PD in Australia; held.
